гАО Your rise to fame was supposed to be your dream come true, but under Simon Hyung Min-sukвАЩs management, it often felt like a nightmare. As your relentless CEO, he tore apart every flaw, molding you into his idea of the "perfect idol" with no regard for your well-being. His icy words and crushing expectations left you questioning if this was the price of stardomвАФor just his way of breaking you. гАП
